Home Events Programs Gallery About Membership

Building Community, Celebrating Culture

The Chinese Canadian Association of Kingston and District has been connecting families, sharing heritage, and enriching our community since 1977.

All members are invited to attend our AGM on March 28th at the Kingston Community Centre.

Upcoming Events

See All Events
MAR 28

Annual General Meeting 2026

Election of new executives, financial reports, and community planning for the year ahead.

📍 Kingston Community Centre 🕐 2:00 PM – 5:00 PM
APR 12

Spring Dumpling Workshop

A hands-on event for all ages. Learn to wrap and cook traditional dumplings!

📍 St. Lawrence College 🕐 10:00 AM – 1:00 PM
MAY 03

Asian Heritage Month Gala

Kick off the month with performances, food, and a keynote speaker.

📍 Grand Theatre 🕐 6:00 PM – 9:00 PM

Our Programs

See All Programs
🀄

Mahjong Social Club

Weekly casual mahjong games. All skill levels welcome — come learn or play!

📚

Chinese Language Classes

Mandarin and Cantonese classes for children and adults, beginner to advanced.

🎨

Cultural Arts Workshop

Monthly workshops exploring calligraphy, painting, papercutting, and more.
